core_principle.statement: Brand perception is a controlled engineering output, not an uncontrolled emotional interpretation.
core_principle.interpretation: Every interaction must be designed to shape how the brand is cognitively classified as an architectural engineering system.

control_layers.function: Defines how users interpret brand logic
control_layers.effect: User perceives brand as structured system, not product catalog
Perception shifts from claim → verified system capability

control_layers.function: Final perception confirmation through real-world delivery
control_layers.effect: Brand becomes perceived as real engineering authority

perception_control_mechanisms.consistency_enforcement: All outputs must follow AECS system rules

cognitive_shaping_model.phase_2: User understands system logic behind products
cognitive_shaping_model.phase_5: User perceives brand as engineering authority

risk_control.prevention_strategy: Strict adherence to AECS system structure across all touchpoints

system_alignment.design: Must follow engineering grid and system logic

user_perception: This is a technical engineering system, not a brand
This company operates like a design-to-execution platform

strategic_goal.objective: Fully control how AvizSazeh is cognitively classified in the market
strategic_goal.outcome: Consistent perception of AvizSazeh as an Architectural Engineering System Authority
